Operation 'reserveDomain' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague about what inputs are required and what the operation returns. Added clarity about the DomainCreate schema requirement, return value details, and the side effect that the domain becomes available for use. This helps AI agents understand the complete operation flow.

data.current_description: Reserve a custom subdomain or bring your own domain
data.description_suggestion: Reserve a custom subdomain or register an existing domain for use with LocalXpose tunnels. Accepts domain configuration via DomainCreate schema. Returns the created domain object with assigned domain ID and status. The domain becomes immediately available for tunnel binding after successful reservation.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what inputs are required and what the operation returns. Added clarity about the DomainCreate schema requirement, return value details, and the side effect that the domain becomes available for use. This helps AI agents understand the complete operation flow.

message: Operation 'getDomain' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is repetitive and lacks specificity. Added clarity about the required domain ID parameter, what information is returned, and the structure of the response. This enables AI agents to understand what data they'll receive and how to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific domain by ID. Requires the domain ID as a path parameter. Returns the complete domain object including configuration, status, and associated tunnel bindings.
data.reasoning: Original description is repetitive and lacks specificity. Added clarity about the required domain ID parameter, what information is returned, and the structure of the response. This enables AI agents to understand what data they'll receive and how to use it.

message: Operation 'deleteDomain' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about the required domain ID parameter, the side effects (deletion of bindings, unavailability), and the irreversible nature of the operation. This helps AI agents understand the consequences before executing this destructive operation.

data.description_suggestion: Release and remove a reserved domain from your account. Requires the domain ID as a path parameter. Deletes the domain and any associated tunnel bindings. The domain becomes unavailable for use after deletion and cannot be recovered.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about the required domain ID parameter, the side effects (deletion of bindings, unavailability), and the irreversible nature of the operation. This helps AI agents understand the consequences before executing this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'generateAccessToken' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about the return value (bearer token), how to use it (Authorization header), and the side effect that new tokens don't invalidate existing ones. data.description_suggestion: Generate a new API access token for the authenticated user. Returns a new bearer token that can be used for subsequent API requests. The token is immediately active and can be used in the Authorization header. Previous tokens remain valid unless explicitly revoked.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about the return value (bearer token), how to use it (Authorization header), and the side effect that new tokens don't invalidate existing ones. This helps AI agents understand the token lifecycle and how to integrate it into their workflows.

message: Operation 'createTunnel' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks details about what configuration parameters are expected (from TunnelCreate schema), what the response contains, and the initial state of the created tunnel. Enhanced description clarifies inputs, outputs, and initial state for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Create a new tunnel to expose a local service
data.description_suggestion: Create a new tunnel to expose a local service to the internet. Accepts tunnel configuration parameters including local port, protocol, and optional domain binding. Returns the created tunnel object with assigned public URL and tunnel ID. The tunnel is created in a stopped state and must be started separately.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks details about what configuration parameters are expected (from TunnelCreate schema), what the response contains, and the initial state of the created tunnel. Enhanced description clarifies inputs, outputs, and initial state for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'updateTunnel' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is minimal and provides no context about inputs, outputs, or effects. Enhanced description specifies what can be updated, the request schema used, return value, and importantly, how changes affect running tunnels - critical for AI agent understanding of side effects.

data.description_suggestion: Update an existing tunnel's configuration by ID. Accepts tunnel configuration parameters (local port, protocol, domain binding, etc.) via TunnelCreate schema. Returns the updated tunnel object. Changes take effect immediately if the tunnel is running; stopped tunnels will apply changes on next start.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and provides no context about inputs, outputs, or effects. Enhanced description specifies what can be updated, the request schema used, return value, and importantly, how changes affect running tunnels - critical for AI agent understanding of side effects.

message: Operation 'deleteTunnel' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical information about what happens to running tunnels and the permanent nature of deletion. Enhanced version clarifies side effects (stopping running tunnels) and irreversibility, essential for AI agents to understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

data.description_suggestion: Delete a tunnel by ID, permanently removing it and its configuration. If the tunnel is running, it will be stopped before deletion. Returns a success response. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical information about what happens to running tunnels and the permanent nature of deletion. Enhanced version clarifies side effects (stopping running tunnels) and irreversibility, essential for AI agents to understand the consequences of this destructive operation.

message: Operation 'startTunnel' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is minimal and doesn't explain the effect of starting a tunnel or what is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the action's purpose (activating exposure), return value, and prerequisite state, improving AI agent understanding of when this operation can be used.

data.description_suggestion: Start a tunnel by ID, activating it to begin exposing the local service to the internet. Returns the updated tunnel object with current status and public URL. The tunnel must be in a stopped state to start successfully.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and doesn't explain the effect of starting a tunnel or what is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the action's purpose (activating exposure), return value, and prerequisite state, improving AI agent understanding of when this operation can be used.

message: Operation 'stopTunnel' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks context about the effect of stopping (ceasing exposure) and what happens to the public URL. Enhanced version clarifies the action's consequences and return value, helping AI agents understand the operational impact of this state change.

data.description_suggestion: Stop a tunnel by ID, deactivating it and ceasing exposure of the local service. Returns the updated tunnel object with stopped status. The public URL will no longer be accessible after stopping.
data.reasoning: Description lacks context about the effect of stopping (ceasing exposure) and what happens to the public URL. Enhanced version clarifies the action's consequences and return value, helping AI agents understand the operational impact of this state change.
